rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scope for port-based contracts; use implementation scope only for bindings tied to subcomponents or connections.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure by only inserting AGREE annexes where ports or constants are explicitly available in scope.
Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible ports, constants, or equations — never direct AADL properties.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be wrapped in annex agree {** ... **};
Use eq declarations to define boolean range conditions from integer or real expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as variables in AGREE expressions.
Avoid placing port-based contracts in implementation scope without corresponding subcomponent bindings.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
